paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, representing a decrease of 3.95% from the prior close and a decline of 20.9% over the past 21 trading sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Draining the Ogallala Aquifer for AI? Project Matador and the myth of limitless growth" from Environment America and "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN, both of which discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt AI campus being built in the Texas Panhandle.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K filing on July 23, 2026, announcing the appointment of four new officers, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there was a Form 4 filing and 16 proxy solicitation filings, with a total of 25 filings in the feed.
